description: Verifies the 'Get In Touch' button routes the user from the hero section to the Contact page.

title: Counters animate from 0 to target values when statistics section becomes visible
description: Verifies that each statistic counter starts at 0 and animates upward when the statistics section scrolls into view.

steps.description: Verify text "0" is visible within the statistics counters area
Wait for the counters to animate
Verify text "0" is not visible within the statistics counters area
Verify at least one non-zero number is visible within the statistics counters area

title: All expected statistic labels are visible in the statistics section
description: Verifies that the statistics section displays all intended statistic tiles (experience, projects, technologies, satisfaction) with their labels visible.

title: Icon elements for each statistic are visible when the statistics section is in view
description: Verifies that each statistic tile shows an icon and that icons are visible alongside the counters when the section is displayed.

steps.description: Verify element "a statistic icon" is visible in the first statistic tile
Verify element "a statistic icon" is visible in the second statistic tile
Verify element "a statistic icon" is visible in the third statistic tile
Verify element "a statistic icon" is visible in the fourth statistic tile

title: Counters do not animate while the statistics section is not visible (before scrolling)
description: Verifies that counters remain at their initial state until the statistics section is actually scrolled into view.

steps.description: Verify element "statistics section" is not visible
Verify text "0" is not visible within the hero section area
Verify text "0" is visible within the statistics counters area

title: Fast scroll past statistics then scroll back triggers counter animation on visibility
description: Verifies that if the user scrolls past quickly and then returns to the statistics section, the counters animate upon becoming visible.

steps.description: Scroll quickly past the statistics section to content below it
Verify element "statistics section" is not visible
Scroll back to the statistics section
Wait for the counters to animate
Verify at least one non-zero number is visible within the statistics counters area

title: Counters reach a stable final value after animation completes
description: Verifies that after the animation finishes, the counters stop changing and remain stable on screen.

steps.description: Wait for the counters to animate
Verify at least one non-zero number is visible within the statistics counters area
Verify the same non-zero number is still visible within the statistics counters area

title: Statistics section remains readable and counters remain visible after animation
description: Verifies that after the counter animation runs, the statistics numbers and labels remain visible and do not disappear.

steps.description: Wait for the counters to animate
Verify at least one non-zero number is visible within the statistics counters area
